feature.title: Mission Feed event scene cards
feature.purpose: Make the company-wide mission feed feel like a game board of unlocked events by turning task, proof, outcome, gate, and trace records into compact visual scene cards.

research.title: Grid Sage Games: Achievements UI Design and Implementation
research.takeaway: Achievement systems need their own attractive interface for notification, browsing, and interaction rather than relying only on raw platform records.

research.title: Dribbble: Game progress map inspiration
research.takeaway: Progress-map inspiration commonly emphasizes clear paths, distinct level nodes, and instantly recognizable advancement states.

research.title: PixelTree: Gamification in UI Design
research.takeaway: Progress meters and gamified feedback make steps toward completion easier to understand at a glance.

research.title: UI Patterns: Collectible Achievements
research.takeaway: Collectible achievements benefit from attractive trophy-like visual objects, which maps well to lane-art scene cards.

interactions: Mission Feed cards now render as data-derived scene cards with lane art, accent colors, realm text, rarity, status, and XP-style reward copy.
Playback cards use the same scene-card renderer so replay feels like a highlighted event object rather than a separate flat card.
Scene-card clicks preserve source lane Trail drilldown.
Scene cards continue to synchronize with the map playback pulse and route highlight.
The implementation uses existing snapshot fields and does not require a new build step or external service.
implementation.portableContract: Any future agent-company repo can provide lane visuals plus missionFeed.items and receive the same scene-card treatment.

checks.playbackTitle: Create money-path coverage audit and next-lane dispatch order
checks.firstTitle: Create money-path coverage audit and next-lane dispatch order

nextIdeas: Generate dedicated event-scene thumbnails for each event kind.
Add animated route particles between the feed scene and active map lane.
Create lane-specific replay presets that unlock different minigame views.
Introduce a collectible achievement wall sourced from completed outcomes.
